required_preferences.fact: Switches to heart-healthy dinners on meeting evenings—opts for reheated home-cooked meals, salads, or grilled fish, avoiding takeout unless it's clearly labeled cholesterol-friendly

supersedes.fact: Keeps dinner simple on meeting evenings, switching to quick reheated meals or healthy takeout to avoid skipping meals during long work sessions

required_preferences.fact: Plans the next day's priorities during early evening—avoids stimulating task management right before bed in order to minimize pre-sleep cognitive activity

supersedes.fact: Plans the next day's top three priorities every night before bed—never leaves task lists open-ended

required_preferences.fact: Sets his phone to Do Not Disturb from 10pm to 7am—never allows social notifications to interrupt sleep
Keeps guest bedding and toiletries ready at all times in his apartment for his father's frequent visits—never stores guest items out of immediate reach
Schedules at least one spontaneous city exploration day each month—never revisits the same neighborhood twice in a row
Chooses to listen to business podcasts during intercity drives instead of music to stay mentally engaged while traveling solo

persona: A recent MBA graduate working in business development for a logistics firm
